title: Gavin Dillingham
compiled_truth: Gavin Dillingham is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-23 to 2001-12-31), Gavin Dillingham sent 75 and received 91 emails, totalling 166 interactions. Top correspondents: [Filuntz](people/filuntz-aol) (59), [Liz](people/liz-luntz) (38), [Nicholas O'Day](people/nicholas-o-day) (37), [Mike Dahlke](people/mike-dahlke) (30), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (21).
